title: Born Under Crossed Stars
original_title: 悪太郎伝　悪い星の下でも
overview: A young man with a strong sense of justice is torn between two girls: the flighty Taneko and the serious Suzuko. With wisdom, courage and honor in a Japanese spirit of manliness he wins the day.
